## Summary

Describe the change.

## Safety And Governance Checklist

- [ ] I did not add real participant data.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, or tokens.
- [ ] I did not add identity mappings or consent records.
- [ ] I did not add real study exports, runtime databases, private logs, or private institutional data.
- [ ] Readiness language remains limited to controlled synthetic/mock testing unless separately evidenced.
- [ ] Delphi consensus is not framed as truth, correctness, scientific proof, or representative population opinion.
- [ ] AI-related changes preserve human review, non-final suggestion labeling, and no consensus steering.
- [ ] Export privacy and identity/response separation are not weakened.
- [ ] Tests and docs were updated where relevant.

## Commands Run

List commands run, or write `NOT RUN` with a short reason.

## Notes

Any limitations, deferred work, or follow-up needed.
